---
pagetitle: "Committee members"
---

::: grid
::: {#organizers_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Committee Members
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .text_block}
### Organizing Committee

 - Matin Nuhamunada _(Dept. of Tropical Biology, UGM)_
 - Yan Restu Freski _(Dept. of Geological Engineering, UGM)_
 - Mukhlish Jamal Musa Holle _(Dept. of Tropical Biology, UGM)_
 - Thoriq Teja Samudra _(Dept. of Tropical Biology, UGM)_
 - Nur Indah Septriani _(Dept. of Tropical Biology, UGM)_

:::

::: g-col-6
![](/img/conf-image.jpeg){.img_block width="100%"}
:::
:::
